title: Reverse Integer
description: Given a signed 32-bit integer x , return x with its digits reversed . If reversing x causes the value to go outside the signed 32-bit integer range [-2 31 , 2 31 - 1] , then return 0 . Assume the environment does not allow you to store 64-bit integers (signed or unsigned).   Example 1: Input: x = 123 Output: 321 Example 2: Input: x = -123 Output: -321 Example 3: Input: x = 120 Output: 21   Constraints: -2 31 <= x <= 2 31 - 1
